title: Swirlix and Slurpuff for Cobblemon! [OUTDATED]
description: A small datapack addon for the Cobblemon mod that adds Swirlix and Slurpuff.
body:
UPDATE: They have been added to base Cobblemon, therefore this datapack is outdated and no longer necessary to have these two in your game. o7

## Adds Swirlix and Slurpuff to Cobblemon! 
(Or I guess, adds models and spawn data for them.)
Do you like little guys? Little fluffy guys, and one with a big cherry on its head? I do, so I learned how to make mod addons specifically to put these two in the Cobblemon mod after about 180+ hours on a server with it. Because I love Swirlix.

![A shiny Swirlix and five other Swirlix in a cherry biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab8f7d0a8e33e90aba2bae43b989f2735b5186c.png)
## Spawning
Swirlix is found commonly in floral biomes, such as the cherry grove and flower forest.
Slurpuff is found within the same biomes, albeit rarer to find. 
There's some compatibility with other biome mods, allowing them both to spawn in floral and magical biomes. 

## Installation
The .zip file must be in both your resource pack folder and datapack folder to work properly.

## Important!
I do not give permission to anyone other than myself to re-upload this datapack anywhere else (ie to Curseforge or something). Go ahead and use it in your modpacks, personal or server or whatever you want, share it with your friends, etc. Just do not re-upload. Thank you ;]
